summary: Team is deep in content creation and translation for the China going global report and Intelligent China program, with key meetings and campaign launches this week.
summaryDetail: We are preparing a one-pager for the president, translating reports and articles, and finalizing press releases. The Asia Start campaign launches with two routes, and we have meetings with Tech in Asia and for the brochure. All final files will be saved to the school's Cloud.

meetings.title: Joint Report Planning: Chinese Companies Going Global
meetings.summary: Team discusses co-publishing a report on Chinese companies globalizing to Southeast Asia, with contributions from both schools, op-eds, and case studies. Launch planned for September at events in Singapore.

meetings.title: Asia Start & New Program Planning
meetings.summary: Reviewed Asia Start campaign with two routes (AI vs traditional), discussed new Intelligent China program targeting foreigners with modules in Beijing, Shanghai, Hangzhou, Shenzhen.

meetings.title: EU-China Cooperation Discussion
meetings.summary: Discussion on EU-China relations, focusing on geopolitical tensions, de-risking, and the role of companies versus governments in shaping cooperation.

actionItems.meetingTitle: Joint Report Planning: Chinese Companies Going Global
actionItems.detail: Outline report structure, title, promotion plan.

actionItems.meetingTitle: Joint Report Planning: Chinese Companies Going Global
actionItems.detail: Confirm event themes and possibility of launching report there.

actionItems.text: Start SCM campaign for Intelligent China program after webpage is done
actionItems.detail: Decide on route (AI or traditional) for the program.

actionItems.meetingTitle: Re: press release - Sun Tianshu at Summer Davos 2026

actionItems.text: Review and finalize translation of Prof Zhu Yang's article 'Timing Itself Can Be Strategy'

actionItems.detail: Ira sent a rewrite of Prof Zhu Yang's article for Julie to double-check against the Chinese draft and finalize.

decisions.text: Report will be jointly published by CKGSB and IE Business School.
decisions.meetingTitle: Joint Report Planning: Chinese Companies Going Global

decisions.text: Working title: 'The New Chinese Playbook for Going Global'.
decisions.meetingTitle: Joint Report Planning: Chinese Companies Going Global

decisions.text: Report to be ready by early September for Singapore events.
decisions.meetingTitle: Joint Report Planning: Chinese Companies Going Global

decisions.text: Asia Start campaign will run two parallel routes for first month: AI (Joseph) and traditional (Daisy).
Intelligent China program targets foreigners, is in English, and focuses on module one first.
Joseph will translate the media monitoring report item (Prof Li Wei's article) as offered.

decisions.text: Kaylee and Xuan will take turns publishing academic seminars on the English website.

decisions.text: All final files will be saved to the school's Cloud going forward.
Julie will coordinate with Flow for the brochure meeting at 3pm.
